title: AI Card Discovery Document
description: Discovery document for AI-native protocols (MCP, A2A, etc.) exposed by a host via /.well-known/ai-cards.json

$schema.description: URI reference to the JSON Schema for this document

protocols.description: Array of protocol objects describing AI-native protocols (servers/agents) available on this host. A single host can expose multiple MCP servers and/or multiple A2A agents.

protocol.description: Describes a single MCP server or A2A agent exposed by this host

type.description: The AI protocol type identifier. Current values: 'mcp' for Model Context Protocol servers, 'a2a' for Agent-to-Agent agents. Future AI protocols may be added.

endpoints.description: Array of endpoint objects where this protocol server/agent can be accessed

metadata.description: Reference to the protocol-specific card metadata file (MCP Server Card or A2A Agent Card)

endpoint.description: A single endpoint URL where the protocol can be accessed

url.description: The endpoint URL where this protocol server/agent can be accessed. May be absolute (https://...) or relative (./path, /path). Relative URLs are resolved relative to the location of the discovery document (/.well-known/ai-cards.json). For example, ./mcp-endpoint resolves to /.well-known/mcp-endpoint, and /api/mcp resolves to /api/mcp.

metadata.description: Reference to protocol-specific card metadata. The structure of the metadata file is owned and defined by the protocol community (MCP or A2A). This SEP only defines the discovery mechanism.

type.description: The metadata card type. Identifies the format/schema of the metadata file. Current values: 'mcp-server-card' for MCP Server Cards, 'agent-card' for A2A Agent Cards. Future card types may be added.

url.description: URL to the protocol-specific card metadata file. May be absolute (https://...) or relative (./path, /path). Relative URLs are resolved relative to the location of the discovery document (/.well-known/ai-cards.json). For example, ./petstore.mcp.json resolves to /.well-known/petstore.mcp.json. For MCP: points to an MCP Server Card. For A2A: points to an A2A Agent Card.
